title: Contract Attestation Bundle
description: A signed bundle published at a tool's well-known endpoint. It binds a guard verdict to a specific contract version. The signature covers every field except signature.

ref.description: The git ref the contract lives on.

commit_sha.description: The commit the contract came from. SHA-1 (40) or SHA-256 (64) hex, short forms allowed.

content_hash.description: Hash of the canonical contract bytes. The verify side pins this.

issued_at.description: Unix time (seconds) the bundle was issued.

ttl_seconds.description: Freshness window. The bundle is valid while now <= issued_at + ttl_seconds.

version.description: Monotonic version. The agent rejects any bundle whose version is below the last accepted one (rollback protection).

verdict.description: The guard decision. The guard is implementation-agnostic; only the vocabulary is fixed.

key_id.description: Identifier of the key or identity that signed the bundle, e.g. ed25519:guard-ci.

signature.description: Detached signature over the canonical serialization of all fields except signature. Hex encoded.
